name: GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension Final Assurance Policy
hardBoundaries: public pages do not auto-connect wallets
public pages do not request token approvals
public pages do not switch networks
public pages do not broadcast Mainnet transactions
expert console requires explicit wallet connection
expert console requires Mainnet switch by user action
expert console uses exact AGIALPHA approvals only
expert console requires simulation and gas estimate before broadcast
expert console requires typed production phrase and wallet signature
public proof commitments remain separate from private intelligence
claimBoundary: This is a public implementation and automated assurance system, not a legal third-party audit opinion or a claim of autonomous production authority.
